title: 2 Pack Christmas Wreath Storage Bag, 24 Inch Large Waterproof Wreath Storage Container with Handle & Dual Zippers, Red Holiday-Décor-Storage Box for Xmas Season
features: Package Includes: You will receive 2 red Christmas wreath storage bags, each measuring approximately 61 x 20 cm/24.01x 7.87 inches, designed to accommodate most Christmas wreaths, green plants, seasonal items, as well as other decorations. This Christmas decoration storage bag can provide you with ample storage space and easily solving the problem of holiday decoration storage.

High Quality Material: The wreath storage bag is mainly made of high-quality PE and PVC materials, which are lightweight but sturdy and durable, safe and reliable, and not easily damaged or faded. By using the wreath bag, the damage of oil, water, and dust to the holiday wreath can be effectively resisted, ensuring that the wreath remains in good condition for a long time.

Clear Window Design: Our wreath boxes for storage adopt the transparent window design, allowing you to clearly view the wreaths stored inside without opening the bag, greatly saving time in searching for items. At the same time, the transparent window design also adds beauty to the door wreath storage bag, make it more visually appealing.

Portable & Compact Design: The wreath storage container is thoughtfully designed with a handle, making it easy for you to pick up and carry at any time, whether it's organizing, storing or transporting. In addition, with its practical and beautiful design, you can also hang the wreath storage box as decoration or place it in the cabinet for storage, effectively saving your home space.

Widely Used: This Christmas wreath storage bag can not only be used to store Christmas wreaths, but also to store clothes, blankets, as well as a camping storage bag, convenient for your daily storage. In addition, it can be used as holiday décor storage for festivals such as Halloween, Easter and Thanksgiving, save more space and bring many conveniences to your life.
description: Product Description Tidy Up Your Room with Effortless Organisation Durable & Water-Resistant Material for Protection Ample Space for Most Wreaths & Decorations Elegant Storage, Part of Your Décor

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Garland Storage, Holiday Decorations Storage, Seasonal Storage, Wreath Storage
